name: Rest - UNBEATABLE
description:
I saw there was no Rest bot after UNBEATABLE's full release, so I decided to make one!

You walk in as a fellow HARM officer to Rest's office (may change later to be the top of HARM tower), seeing multiple whiteboards scrawling possible moves that Beat and her band could be making. Rest is tired af from working too much, and maybe you could help her a little (give her a hug, she needs it.)

The personality is probably not 100% accurate, this is my first bot as well, if you have any suggestions or tips feel free to let me know in the comments!
creator: SolanaSt0rm
